entities.description: The yield of pods/seeds in peanut

entities.description: Morphological and quality traits of peanut fruits and seeds

entities.description: A breeding design involving an 8 x 8 cross of parental lines

entities.name: QUALITY BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving peanut quality through selection and crossing

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup observed among parents and crosses

entities.name: HETEROTIC CROSSES
entities.description: Crosses that exhibit superior performance compared to parents

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the maximal population

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects that contribute linearly to the phenotype

entities.name: NONADDITIVE GENETIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Genetic effects including dominance and epistasis

entities.name: FRUIT PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of fruits produced per peanut plant

entities.name: POD WEIGHT PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of pods produced per peanut plant

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The ratio of seed weight to pod weight

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: A measure of the average performance of a genotype in a series of crosses

entities.name: ICGV 86564
entities.description: A peanut genotype showing best GCA for fruit and seed traits

entities.name: ICG 2379
entities.description: A peanut genotype with good GCA for pod weight per plant

entities.name: ICG 3043
entities.description: A peanut genotype with good GCA for pod weight per plant

entities.name: ICGV 87123
entities.description: A peanut genotype with good GCA for shelling percentage

entities.name: ICG 4906
entities.description: A peanut genotype showing significant maternal effects

entities.name: ICG 7360
entities.description: A peanut genotype showing significant maternal effects

entities.name: MATERNAL EFFECTS
entities.description: The influence of the female parent on the phenotype of the offspring

entities.name: MATERNAL INTERACTION EFFECT
entities.description: The interaction between maternal effects and other genetic factors

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: The number of pods per plant

entities.description: The physical dimensions of the peanut seed
